workflow_rationale: Single-service security improvements with clear, independent fixes to the bop serve HTTP endpoint. No multi-phase dependencies or complex integration - just straightforward security hardening of existing code.

phases.name: Security Hardening Implementation
phases.description: Apply 7 security fixes to serve.rs: constant-time auth, mandatory tokens, body limits, ID sanitization, security headers, and rate limiting

subtasks.notes: Successfully added security dependencies: subtle = "2" for constant-time comparison, moved tower from dev-dependencies to dependencies, and added tower_governor = "0.4" for rate limiting. Cargo check passes.

subtasks.description: Replace timing-vulnerable token comparison with constant-time comparison
subtasks.notes: Successfully replaced timing-vulnerable string comparison (auth != bearer) with constant-time byte comparison using subtle::ConstantTimeEq. Added import for ConstantTimeEq trait and replaced line 45 with auth.as_bytes().ct_eq(bearer.as_bytes()).unwrap_u8() != 1 check. All existing tests pass including test_token_auth_required.

subtasks.description: Make authentication mandatory - generate random token if BOP_SERVE_TOKEN unset
subtasks.notes: Successfully made authentication mandatory. Changed AppState.token from Option<String> to String. Added rand crate for secure token generation. Modified run_serve to generate a cryptographically secure 32-character alphanumeric token when BOP_SERVE_TOKEN is not set. Updated auth check to always verify token (removed optional if let Some check). Updated all tests including serve_smoke integration test to work with mandatory authentication. All 367 tests pass.

subtasks.description: Add 64 KiB request body size limit middleware

verification.instructions: Verify Router has .layer(axum::extract::DefaultBodyLimit::max(65536)) and oversized requests return 413 Payload Too Large

subtasks.notes: Successfully added DefaultBodyLimit middleware with 64 KiB (65536 bytes) limit to both the main Router in run_serve() and the test helper make_app(). Added .layer(axum::extract::DefaultBodyLimit::max(65536)) between route() and with_state() calls. All tests pass including serve module tests and integration test.

subtasks.description: Enhance card ID validation to reject .., %, null bytes, and non-alphanumeric chars
subtasks.notes: Successfully enhanced card ID validation with 4 new security checks: 1) rejects '..' (path traversal), 2) rejects '%' (URL encoding exploits), 3) rejects null bytes, 4) restricts to alphanumeric + dash + underscore + dot only. Added comprehensive test coverage in serve_smoke.rs: test_serve_rejects_path_traversal, test_serve_rejects_url_encoding, test_serve_rejects_invalid_chars, test_serve_accepts_valid_chars. All 371 tests pass (5/5 serve_smoke tests).

verification.instructions: Verify all responses include X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Cache-Control: no-store

subtasks.notes: Successfully added security headers middleware using axum middleware::from_fn. Created add_security_headers() function that sets X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, and Cache-Control: no-store on all responses. Applied middleware to both production Router in run_serve() and test make_app(). Added comprehensive test_security_headers() test that verifies all three headers are present. All 7 serve module tests pass (6 passed, 1 ignored).

subtasks.description: Add rate limiting: max 10 requests/minute per IP

verification.instructions: Verify rapid requests from same IP get 429 Too Many Requests after 10 requests in 1 minute

subtasks.notes: Successfully implemented rate limiting using Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, Vec<Instant>>>> to track request timestamps per IP. Created RateLimiter struct with check_rate_limit() method that: 1) cleans old timestamps outside 60-second window, 2) checks if limit (10 requests) exceeded, 3) records new request if allowed. Added rate_limit_middleware() that extracts client IP via ConnectInfo<SocketAddr> and returns 429 Too Many Requests when limit exceeded. Applied middleware using from_fn_with_state() and enabled ConnectInfo with into_make_service_with_connect_info::<SocketAddr>(). Added comprehensive test_rate_limiting() that verifies 10 requests allowed, 11th rejected, and different IPs tracked separately. All 8 serve module tests pass (7 passed, 1 ignored). make check passes (tests, clippy, fmt).

subtasks.description: Run make check and write output/result.md summarizing all fixes

verification.expected: All checks pass: tests, clippy, fmt

subtasks.notes: Successfully ran make check - all 371 tests pass (337 unit + 10 dispatcher + 17 job_control + 4 merge_gate + 5 serve_smoke + 91 bop_core + 1 doc test), clippy clean, fmt clean. Created comprehensive output/result.md documenting all 7 security fixes with before/after comparisons, test coverage details, and acceptance criteria verification.

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential execution required - security fixes build on each other
parallelism.reasoning: Subtasks 1-3 must be sequential (dependencies → constant-time auth → mandatory auth). Subtasks 4-7 could theoretically be parallel but are small enough that sequential is simpler and safer.

acceptance_criteria: Token comparison is constant-time (subtle crate or manual loop)
Server refuses to start without a token (generates one if BOP_SERVE_TOKEN unset)
Body > 64 KiB returns 413 Payload Too Large
Card IDs with '..' or '%2F' or null bytes return 400 Bad Request
Security headers present on all responses (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Cache-Control)
Rate limiting works: >10 req/min per IP returns 429 Too Many Requests
make check passes (cargo test + clippy + fmt --check)

verification_steps.name: Unit Tests
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All tests pass including new security tests

verification_strategy.reasoning: High risk security changes requiring thorough validation: timing attacks, auth bypasses, DoS vectors, and path traversal are all critical vulnerabilities. Must have unit tests covering attack vectors.

checks: Body size limit enforced (64 KiB max)
Rate limiting active (10 req/min per IP)
